355db0aa.title: about
messages: You are a helpful AI assistant. Respond clearly, accurately, and concisely.
Hello! How can I assist you today?

I’m ChatGPT, an AI language model created by OpenAI. I’ve been trained on a broad range of text up to June 2024, which lets me help with things like answering questions, explaining concepts, brainstorming ideas, drafting writing, tutoring in many subjects, and much more. I don’t have personal experiences or feelings, but I aim to be clear, accurate, and useful in our conversations. Let me know what you’d like to discuss or work on!
Absolutely! What do you need help with today? Feel free to give me as much detail as you’d like, and I’ll do my best to assist.
